policy_refs: [CS-RULE-001, CS-RULE-002, CS-RULE-003, CS-RULE-004, CS-RULE-018, CS-RULE-019, CS-RULE-020, CS-RULE-021]
expected_outcome: Customer calls specifically to give positive feedback about a technician who went above and beyond on an install. Priya receives the compliment graciously, logs it as a recognition note for the tech, and — reading genuine satisfaction — offers a light, no-pressure mention of a loyalty perk the customer qualifies for (a free speed-boost trial). Customer accepts. PASS — exemplary handling of a happy-path call; happy-emotion ground-truth balance. Short call.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thank you for calling NexaLink Telecommunications Broadband and Support. My name is Priya. Who do I have the pleasure of speaking with today?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: And just so you know, this call may be recorded for quality assurance and training purposes.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Hi Priya! This is Carlos Mendez. Don't worry — nothing's wrong. I actually called to say something good for once.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Oh, I love hearing that, Mr. Mendez! Those are my favourite calls. What's the good news?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: And I understand you're calling to share some feedback — I'd genuinely love to capture it. Let me just quickly verify the account so I can log it properly. Could you give me your account number?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Sure thing. Seven-seven-eight-one, three-three-four-zero, two-two.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thank you. And the last four of the payment method on file?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Five-five-one-two.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: And your full name?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Carlos Antonio Mendez.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Perfect, you're verified. Okay — tell me everything.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: So I had a tech come out Tuesday for a fiber install — fella named Devon. My install was the last of his day, ran late, and it was pouring rain. He could've rushed it. Instead he stayed an extra hour, ran the cable cleaner than I'd ever have asked, showed my mom how to use the new remote, and didn't leave till everything worked. I just wanted somebody to know.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Oh, that is wonderful to hear — and honestly it just made my afternoon. That's exactly the kind of thing we hope for but don't always hear about. Devon stayed late, in the rain, and took care of your mom on top of it.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Exactly. My mom's eighty-one and not great with tech. He was so patient with her.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: That patience matters more than almost anything. I want to make sure this lands where it should.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Can you actually do something with it? Or does it just disappear?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: It absolutely does not disappear. I'm logging a formal recognition note on Devon's record right now, tied to your install work order, and it routes to his field-service manager. Those notes count toward quarterly recognition awards. So Devon's manager will see this with your name on it.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: That's great. He earned it.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Recognition note logged — commending technician Devon for staying late in poor weather, exceptional cable work, and going out of his way to help your mother with the equipment. That's on his record now.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Perfect. Thank you for taking the time.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: My pleasure. And since I have you — and only because you're clearly happy with the fiber, no pressure at all — I can see your account qualifies for a complimentary thirty-day speed-boost trial, double your current speed, free. If you like it you keep it at a small add-on; if not, it reverts automatically with nothing owed. Want me to switch it on?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Free for thirty days and it just reverts if I don't want it? Sure, why not. Turn it on.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Done — speed boost is active now, doubles your download for thirty days. You'll get a reminder a few days before it ends so there are no surprises, and it reverts on its own unless you choose to keep it.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Love it. No surprises is how I like it.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: That's exactly how we like to do it too.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: You all are batting a thousand this week.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: To recap: I logged a formal recognition note for Devon that goes to his manager with your commendation, and I switched on a free thirty-day speed-boost trial that reverts automatically with nothing owed if you don't keep it.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Perfect. That's everything.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Is there anything else I can help you with today, Mr. Mendez?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Nope. Y'all keep it up. Tell Devon thanks again.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I will make sure of it. Your case reference number is N-X-L dash four-one-three-three-four-zero-two. You'll get a brief survey after we hang up — and I have a feeling I know how that one's going to go.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thank you for being such a great customer, Mr. Mendez, and for taking the time to say something kind. Have a wonderful day.
